name: spec-driven-dev
description: Spec-driven development pipeline: brainstorming → plans → (UML/Figma) → OpenSpec → SDD/TDD → verification. Each step gated by user review; artifacts converge in openspec/changes/{change-id}/.

interface.shortDescription: OpenSpec workflow from brainstorming through verification
interface.longDescription: Spec-driven development pipeline for turning ideas into approved designs, plans, OpenSpec requirements, implementation, and verification with explicit review gates.
defaultPrompt: Turn an approved design into tasks
Update specs after a scope change
